title: SEO improvements for public marketplace (loading time, proper HTML links, etc)

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
I notice some feature requests in here, so I’m going to have my say on some off the top of my head.

1. Vendor home page in marketplace

Somewhere that the marketplace vendor can link to with all their apps displayed. Maybe even say a little about themselves.

2. Proper HTML links in marketplace / Search engine discovery

Has anyone seen the code for the app marketplace? A lot of links are not actually links, but Javascript click events. Making the marketplace browsable by search engines would be very useful for app findability for all apps.

Also, I use CTRL+Click to open links in new browser tabs (think loads of open tabs). This just isn’t possible unless you are using links.

When it comes to search engine discovery, the marketplace appears to be a closed book unless it’s an app that’s listed on the front page.

3. Allow vendors to update app page text and images

Dunno about you, but I don’t want to wait for someone at monday•com to update my copy and images for me, or even have to do that job.

I’m happy for there to be an approval step if required, but would like change things myself.

4. Marketplace load times

Can this be improved? It’s somewhat slow even on a fast connection

I’m seeing 35MB of content loaded in 188 requests in a total time of around 17 seconds in the developer console.

I see the first contentful paint taking 6.4 seconds.

I can recommend the Lighthouse reports in Chrome developer tools for more info.

posts.author: hollywright (Holly Wright)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hen replying to this thread to echo these requests. We’d love a vendor homepage like we have on the Atlassian marketplace, but I would say the other three are even more valuable in the near-term to accelerate growth for marketplace partners.

I have personally been experiencing very slow load times over the last month or two. Sometimes 8 seconds or longer. Uploading a quick video taken just now. Anyway, additional improvements to load times would be huge for SEO rankings and bounce rates. Thanks!

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@hen theres been some more upvotes in this, but they are most interested in #1 - the vendor homepage.

Is that on the roadmap anywhere yet?

posts.author: Lawky (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: Using proper HTML links instead of JavaScript click events is essential for search engine discoverability and user navigation, especially for power users like me who love to CTRL+Click for quick tab opening.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Lawky an update for links rather than click events has now been deployed to marketplace.

You’ll notice as a result that all the product pages have started appearing in SERPs.

I’ve noticed that the load times are improved somewhat and last time I looked, total content size is down from ~35MB to ~11MB. This is a massive improvement, but there is still some way to go. I’m not sure, but maybe it’s automated compression of the image gallery which would fix that.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks! Just updating this thread with some improvements that we’ve made in the last quarter or so.

Given that 3 out of 4 of these requests have been implemented, I’m going to tag this as Released. I will create a new feature request for the “Vendor homepage in Marketplace” and link it here.

Proper HTML links in marketplace – done

This is done! You can now CTRL-click the links in the public marketplace and it’s improved search engine discovery too (you can now find marketplace listing pages directly in Google).

Allow vendors to update app page (listing) text & images

This is done too! In the last quarter we’ve added self-service tools so developers can update their listings themselves.

Marketplace load times - done

This has been significantly improved too in the last few months. With performance there’s always more to be done, but we’ve made big strides so far.

Vendor home page - under consideration

This is still being considered by our product team. I will repost this as a separate request so you can show your support and we can make a case to our PMs.
EDIT: You can vote for this request here - Vendor homepage in marketplace

posts.author: SJobbsy (SJobbsy)
posts.cookedHtml: I just wanted to jump in and say I totally agree with the points raised here, especially about improving HTML links and load times in the marketplace. As someone who’s dabbled in web development (and worked with a freelance seo expert or two), the current setup does seem like it could use a serious refresh. The lack of proper HTML links is such a pain, right? Not being able to CTRL+Click for new tabs feels like a step back in usability, not to mention how much it limits search engine discovery. Making the marketplace more accessible to search engines could really boost visibility for all the apps, not just the ones front and center.

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.

monday.com is such a strong domain from a SEO perspective. The app listings would rank incredibly well if they were simply optimized for Google. And we all would be getting way more listing views

I think the main problem is that the loading performance is not so great and that the marketplace ist built as a single page app and isn’t server side rendered, which isn’t good for SEO.

– Simon
